title: Run budget (cron wall-clock ceiling)
description: runDueAiJobs never STARTS a job that can't finish its full per-job deadline before the function's wall-clock ceiling (FUNCTION_BUDGET_MS), so a late job is never hard-killed mid-run and left stuck.
rollbackSteps: Revert the sync commit; behavior degrades gracefully (late jobs deferred to the next tick).
compatibilityNotes: Pure backend scheduling guard — no branding. Direct port; align FUNCTION_BUDGET_MS with the downstream cron maxDuration.

history.note: Registered from completed upstream worker hardening.
